title: DOKOT Natural Seagrass Storage Basket With Handle, Foldable Belly Basket for Toys & Laundry
features: The basket is made of Natural Seagrass, handmade product,every basket will be a little different not as machine made. Please kindly allowed for the existence of some flaws
Multi-application: Christmas, Holiday Decor, Creative Storage, Plant Pot, Blanket Basket, Laundry Basket, Towel Basket, Toy Organizer, Picnic, Grocery Baskets, Beach Bag, etc.

As an Elegant Plant Basket: Usually used be a plant pot to plant the flower to make your home more chic; As a Foldable Storage Basket: fold in the middle to create a bowl shape, can be used for home storage like clothes, quilt, dolls
Perfect for every corner of the house, table, corridor, living room, children's room, bathroom, balcony space
Can used as storage basket, Size: top openning diameter: 10.6inches/27cm; widest part diameter: 14.2inch/36cm, height: 12.2inches/31m(handle not included).
description: Product Description DOKOT Seagrass Belly Basket Woven Plant Pot with Handle 100% Natural Seagrass Material The basket is made of natural seagrass and designed with sturdy handles, handmade product,every basket will be a little different not as machine made. Please kindly allowed for the existence of some flaws. Due to seasonal factors, if you receive a greenish basket, don't worry, as the seagrass continues to age and dry, it will turn the color of the advertised picture The baskets are totally handmade, it cannot be as perfect as made by machine, some flaws may exist. Fold in the middle to create a bowl shape The basket could be folded in the middle to create a bowl shape for create home storage The product would be packed as folded, but do not influence the quality Perfect for every corner of the house, table, corridor, living room, children's room, bathroom, balcony space Seagrass Plant Pot As an Elegant Plant Basket: Usually used be a plant pot to plant the flower to make your home more chic Laundry Basket Multi-application Basket: Could also used as Blanket Basket, Laundry Basket, Towel Basket etc Creative Storage As a Foldable Storage Basket: fold in the middle to create a bowl shape, can be used for home storage like clothes, quilt, dolls Different sizes for different usage, choose the size according to your needs Small sizes belly basket could be used as a storage basket for toys, dolls or other small stuff or used as kids tote basket Medium size basket suitable to hold medium size indoor plants Large size basket suitable to hold large size indoor plants or trees White Seagrass Belly Basket Black Seagrass Belly Basket Rectangular Seagrass Storage Basket with Lid Rectangular Seagrass Placemats Round Rattan Tray with Handles Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.1 out of 5 stars 2,434 4.1 out of 5 stars 2,434 4.5 out of 5 stars 1,349 4.3 out of 5 stars 723 4.2 out of 5 stars 274 Price — no data £17.99 £ 17 . 99 £16.99 £ 16 . 99 £17.99 £ 17 . 99 — no data Material Seagrass Seagrass Seagrass Seagrass Rattan Color White Black Natural Natural Natural Brand DOKOT DOKOT DOKOT DOKOT DOKOT
